{{神社 | 名称=天神社 | 画像=[[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 01.jpg|280px|天神社（千葉県白井市）]] | 所在地=千葉県白井市根417 | 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|46|38.11|N|140|2|24.71|E|scale:5000}} | 創建=不詳 | 社格=村社 | 祭神=菅原道真公 | 本殿= }}
'''天神社'''（てんじんじゃ）は、[[千葉県]][[白井市]]にある神社である。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は村社。
== 概要 == *境内 **本殿・幣殿・拝殿 **社務所 [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 02.jpg|thumb|拝殿]]
== 祭神 == *[[菅原道真]]公
== 関連項目 == *[[印旛郡]] *[[白井市]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://www14.plala.or.jp/nikorobin/jinjyabukkaku.html k.k gallery]

{{Shrine | Name = Tenjin Shrine | image = [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 01.jpg|280px|Tenjin Shrine (Shiroi City, Chiba Prefecture)]] | location = Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture, Japan | coordinates = {{coord|35|46|38.11|N|140|2|24.71|E|scale:5000}} | Founded = Unknown | type = Village Shrine (村社) | deity = Sugawara no Michizane | Main Hall = }}
'''Tenjin Shrine''' (天神社, Tenjinsha) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Shiroi, Chiba|ja|白井市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}, Japan. Under the {{ill|Modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was classified as a **Village Shrine (村社)**.
== Overview == * Shrine Grounds ** Main Hall (本殿), Offering Hall (幣殿), Worship Hall (拝殿) ** Shrine Office (社務所) [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 02.jpg|thumb|Worship Hall]]
== Enshrined deity == * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane}}== See Also == * {{ill|Inba District, Chiba|ja|印旛郡}} * {{ill|Shiroi, Chiba|ja|白井市}}
== External Links == * [http://www14.plala.or.jp/nikorobin/jinjyabukkaku.html k.k gallery]
{{Shinto-stub}}

revision.text:
{{Shrine | Name = Tenjin Shrine | image = [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 01.jpg|280px|Tenjin Shrine (Shiroi City, Chiba Prefecture)]] | location = Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture, Japan | coordinates = {{coord|35|46|38.11|N|140|2|24.71|E|scale:5000}} | Founded = Unknown | type = Village Shrine (村社) | deity = Sugawara no Michizane | Main Hall = }}
'''Tenjin Shrine''' (天神社, Tenjinsha) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Shiroi, Chiba|ja|白井市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}, Japan. Under the {{ill|Modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was classified as a **Village Shrine (村社)**.
== Overview == * Shrine Grounds ** Main Hall (本殿), Offering Hall (幣殿), Worship Hall (拝殿) ** Shrine Office (社務所) [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 02.jpg|thumb|Worship Hall]]
== Enshrined deity == * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane}} == See Also == * {{ill|Inba District, Chiba|ja|印旛郡}} * {{ill|Shiroi, Chiba|ja|白井市}}
== External Links == * [http://www14.plala.or.jp/nikorobin/jinjyabukkaku.html k.k gallery]
{{Shinto-stub}}

{{Shrine | Name = Tenjin Shrine | image = [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 01.jpg|280px|Tenjin Shrine (Shiroi City, Chiba Prefecture)]] | location = Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture, Japan | coordinates = {{coord|35|46|38.11|N|140|2|24.71|E|scale:5000}} | Founded = Unknown | type = Village Shrine (村社) | deity = Sugawara no Michizane | Main Hall = }}
'''Tenjin Shrine''' (天神社, Tenjinsha) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Shiroi, Chiba|ja|白井市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}, Japan. Under the {{ill|Modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was classified as a **Village Shrine (村社)**.
== Overview == * Shrine Grounds ** Main Hall (本殿), Offering Hall (幣殿), Worship Hall (拝殿) ** Shrine Office (社務所) [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 02.jpg|thumb|Worship Hall]]
== Enshrined deity == * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane}} == See Also == * {{ill|Inba District, Chiba|ja|印旛郡}} * {{ill|Shiroi, Chiba|ja|白井市}}
== External Links == * [http://www14.plala.or.jp/nikorobin/jinjyabukkaku.html k.k gallery]

'''Tenjin Shrine''' (天神社, Tenjinsha) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Shiroi, Chiba|ja|白井市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県|12=draft}}, Japan. Under the {{ill|Modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=draft}}, it was classified as a **Village Shrine (村社)**.
== Overview == * Shrine Grounds ** Main Hall (本殿), Offering Hall (幣殿), Worship Hall (拝殿) ** Shrine Office (社務所) [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 02.jpg|thumb|Worship Hall]]
== Enshrined deity == * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|12=draft}} == See Also == * {{ill|Inba District, Chiba|ja|印旛郡|12=draft}} * {{ill|Shiroi, Chiba|ja|白井市|12=draft}}
== External Links == * [http://www14.plala.or.jp/nikorobin/jinjyabukkaku.html k.k gallery]

revision.text:
{{神社 | 名称=天神社 | 画像=[[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 01.jpg|280px|天神社（千葉県白井市）]] | 所在地=千葉県白井市根417 | 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|46|38.11|N|140|2|24.71|E|scale:5000}} | 創建=不詳 | 社格=村社 | 祭神=菅原道真公 | 本殿= }}
'''天神社'''（てんじんじゃ）は、[[千葉県]][[白井市]]にある神社である。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は村社。
== 概要 == *境内 **本殿・幣殿・拝殿 **社務所 [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 02.jpg|thumb|拝殿]]
== 祭神 == *[[菅原道真]]公
== 関連項目 == *[[印旛郡]] *[[白井市]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://www14.plala.or.jp/nikorobin/jinjyabukkaku.html k.k gallery]
{{Shinto-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:てんしんしや_しろい}} [[Category:千葉県の神社]] [[Category:白井市の歴史]] [[Category:千葉県の旧村社]] [[Category:天満宮]] [[Category:白井市の建築物]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:天神社 (白井市)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q17191784]] Wikidata name: Tenjinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = Tenjin Shrine | image = File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 01.jpg | location = Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture, Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|35.7772528|N|140.0401972|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | Founded = Unknown | type = Village Shrine (村社) | deity = Sugawara no Michizane | Main Hall = | location = {{ill|Shiroi|qid=Q519187}} }}
'''Tenjin Shrine''' (天神社, Tenjinsha) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiroi|Shiroi, Chiba]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]], Japan. '''Tenjin Shrine''' (天神社, Tenjinsha) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Shiroi|en|Shiroi|WD=Q519187|lt=Shiroi, Chiba}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}, Japan. Under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|en|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was classified as a **Village Shrine (村社)**.
== Overview == * Shrine Grounds ** Main Hall (本殿), Offering Hall (幣殿), Worship Hall (拝殿) ** Shrine Office (社務所) [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 02.jpg|thumb|Worship Hall]]
== Enshrined deity == * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} == See Also == * {{ill|Inba District|en|Inba District|WD=Q677245|lt=Inba District, Chiba}} * {{ill|Shiroi|en|Shiroi|WD=Q519187|lt=Shiroi, Chiba}}

'''Tenjin Shrine''' (天神社, Tenjinsha) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Shiroi|en|Shiroi|WD=Q519187|lt=Shiroi, Chiba|1=Shiroi}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}, Japan. Under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|en|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was classified as a **Village Shrine (村社)**.
== Overview == * Shrine Grounds ** Main Hall (本殿), Offering Hall (幣殿), Worship Hall (拝殿) ** Shrine Office (社務所) [[File:Tenjin Shrine (Shirai City, Chiba Prefecture) 02.jpg|thumb|Worship Hall]]
== Enshrined deity == * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} == See Also == * {{ill|Inba District|en|Inba District|WD=Q677245|lt=Inba District, Chiba|1=Inba District}} * {{ill|Shiroi|en|Shiroi|WD=Q519187|lt=Shiroi, Chiba|1=Shiroi}}
